title: Wisdompro Luggage Straps, 2 Pack Heavy Duty Utility Webbing Strap Adjustable for Backpacking, Camping, Hiking, Sleeping Bag Compression, Suitcases with Quick Release Buckle Clip - 48 inch, Black
features: Product Size - Length: 48 inches (1.2 m) Width: 1 inch (25 mm) Thickness: 1.5 mm
The maximum loading capacity of the plastic ladder buckle is 30 KG. These straps can be used for securing or fastening luggage. (Note：Not suitable for towing or lifting (lowering) operation.)

Premium Material - The ladder buckle and adjuster buckle are made of rugged plastic, and the belt is made of durable nylon webbing fabric which is lightweight meanwhile wear-resistant, tear-resistant, strong and durable.

Wide Application - These webbing straps with buckles are great for strapping rucksacks/backpacks, suitcases, securing or compressing luggage or other gear; sleeping pads/mats, sleeping bags, camping mattress, tents, travel bed and so on. You can even use these straps as golf trolley strap replacement to keep your golf bag in place. They can be widely used for outdoor travel, hiking, camping, etc.
Wisdompro Retail Package Includes 2 x Sleeping Bag Compression luggage strap (48 inches, Black)
description: Product Description Wisdompro 2 Pack of 48 Inches Luggage Straps for Backpacking, Sleeping Bag Compression, Luggage, Bundling, etc. These all-purpose straps have too many possible uses to list! Whether for work, outdoor adventure sports, while traveling, or just around the home - you will find these simple and convenient straps to be very useful.
